manifest:
Package: com.example.obs.player (obfuscated name)
Company: Star Dream / The Voice Entertainment Inc. (British Virgin Islands)
App Name: HOT51 / 星夢 (Star Dream)
Min SDK: Android (multiple DEX = high complexity)
Permissions detected via strings:
- INTERNET, ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE, CAMERA, RECORD_AUDIO
- READ_PHONE_STATE (IMEI collection via adjust.sdk.imei)
- RECEIVE_SMS, READ_SMS (SMS OTP verification)
- WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
Native libs: libZegoExpressEngine, libliteavsdk, libmmkv, libtpcore, libxgVipSecurity
javaSample:
// JADX decompile running in background
// Key packages from DEX strings analysis:

// Live Streaming Layer
com.example.obs.player.component.player.live.LiveManager
com.example.obs.player.component.player.live.LiveProxy
com.example.obs.player.ui.dialog.live.LiveNoticeDialog
com.example.obs.player.ui.dialog.live.LinkMcpDialog
com.example.obs.player.ui.dialog.live.LiveVodRateDialog
com.example.obs.player.model.live.GiftPackageModel
com.example.obs.player.model.live.PkAnchorInfoModel
com.example.obs.player.model.live.LiveStreamTimeConfig

// Gift System
com.example.obs.player.ui.fragment.live.GiftListFragment  // sendGift()
com.example.obs.player.ui.fragment.live.PkgListFragment   // sendGift()

// SDKs
com.tencent.liteav.demo     (Tencent Live - video streaming)
com.tencent.thumbplayer.core
com.adjust.sdk              (Mobile analytics + attribution)
com.appsflyer               (Marketing attribution)
com.alibaba.fastjson.JSONObject (JSON parsing)
com.alipay.sdk              (Alipay payment)
com.bumptech.glide.manager  (Image loading)
com.drake.*                 (Kotlin framework: net, serialization, statusbar, tooltip)
com.bigkoo.convenientbanner (Banner/carousel UI)
com.bigkoo.pickerview       (Date/time picker)
com.caverock.androidsvg     (SVG rendering)
com.chuckerteam.chucker     (HTTP debug interceptor)
sdks: Zego Express Engine (libZegoExpressEngine) - Real-time audio/video streaming
Tencent LiteAV SDK (libliteavsdk) - Video playback & streaming
MMKV (libmmkv) - High-performance key-value storage by WeChat
features: Live streaming with Zego + Tencent dual-SDK
PK Battle system (pk_bar_running, pk_win, pk_lose, pk_start, pk_tie)
Gift system with SVGA animations (ic_room_gift, ic_living)
Multi-language: zh-Hans, zh-Hant, EN, HI, PT-BR, VI
Bank integration: Vietnam, China, Brazil, India, Thailand
APK IP geolocation for region detection
